mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_event_apply a LEFT JOIN erp_event e ON a.event_id = e.event_id
AND (a.member_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR e.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT a.apply_id, a.event_id, COALESCE(a.event_title, e.title) AS event_title, e.event_date, a.member_id, a.member_name, a.apply_date, a.status FROM erp_event_apply a LEFT JOIN erp_event e ON a.event_id = e.event_id WHERE a.status = 'CONFIRM' AND (a.member_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR e.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY a.apply_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_event_apply a LEFT JOIN erp_event e ON a.event_id = e.event_id WHERE a.status = 'CONFIRM' AND (a.member_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR e.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT e.event_id, e.title, e.event_date, e.end_date, e.location, e.description, e.capacity, e.organizer, e.status, e.reg_date, COUNT(a.apply_id) AS applicant_count FROM erp_event e LEFT JOIN erp_event_apply a ON e.event_id = a.event_id AND a.status = 'CONFIRM' WHERE e.status = 'COMPLETE' AND e.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' GROUP BY e.event_id, e.title, e.event_date, e.end_date, e.location, e.description, e.capacity, e.organizer, e.status, e.reg_date ORDER BY e.event_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_event WHERE status = 'COMPLETE' AND title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
